title: Line 10105 – Tax-exempt income for emergency services volunteers - Canada.ca
content:
## Line 10105 – Tax-exempt income for emergency services volunteers
Report the emergency services volunteer exempt amount from box 87 of your T4 slips on line 10105 of your return.
If you provided volunteer emergency services for more than one employer, you can claim the $1,000 exemption for each of your eligible employers.

## Forms and publications
- Line 10100 – Employment income
- Line 31220 – Volunteer firefighters' amount
- Line 31240 – Search and rescue volunteers' amount

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
